parameters.content:
## Monthly Financial Report Generator — Google Sheets P&L + GPT-4o-mini + Gmail

For finance teams and business owners who want a complete executive P&L report emailed automatically every month — with zero manual work and no ERP or database required. On the 5th of each month the workflow reads income and expense data from two Google Sheet tabs, calculates a full profit and loss statement (Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Operating Expenses, Net Profit) with budget vs actual variance and margins, sends the structured P&L to GPT-4o-mini for executive-level analysis, and emails a formatted HTML report to the finance team. Each run is logged to a tracking tab.

## How it works
- **1. Schedule Trigger — 5th of Every Month** fires monthly on the 5th
- **2. Code — Get Previous Month** calculates the previous month and year for filtering
- **3. Google Sheets — Get Income Data** reads all rows from the Income tab — runs in parallel with node 4
- **4. Google Sheets — Get Expense Data** reads all rows from the Expenses tab — runs in parallel with node 3
- **5. Code — Build P&L Statement** filters both datasets for the previous month, calculates Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Operating Expenses, Net Profit with variance and margins, and builds a structured P&L text for the AI
- **6. AI Agent — Generate HTML Report** uses GPT-4o-mini to produce a complete executive HTML financial report with KPI bar, tables, and recommendations
- **OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** language model attached to the AI Agent
- **7. Code — Clean HTML Output** strips any markdown code fences from the AI output and passes summary numbers through
- **8. Gmail — Email Report to Finance Team** and **9. Google Sheets — Log Report Run** run in parallel — Gmail sends the HTML report, Sheets logs the run summary

## Set up steps
1. Create a Google Sheet with two tabs. Income tab columns: Category, Budget, Actual, Month, Year. Expenses tab columns: Category, Type (COGS or Operating), Budget, Actual, Month, Year. Add a third tab named Report Log for run history. Month and Year columns must be numeric (5 not May)
2. In **3. Google Sheets — Get Income Data** — connect Google Sheets OAuth2 and replace `YOUR_INCOME_SHEET_ID`. Tab is set to Income
3. In **4. Google Sheets — Get Expense Data** — replace `YOUR_EXPENSE_SHEET_ID` (can be the same Sheet ID as income). Tab is set to Expenses
4. In **OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI API credential. Replace `YOUR_COMPANY_NAME` in node 6 system prompt
5. In **8. Gmail — Email Report to Finance Team** — connect Gmail OAuth2 and replace `YOUR_REPORT_EMAIL` with the finance recipient. Replace `YOUR_COMPANY_NAME` in the subject if desired
6. In **9. Google Sheets — Log Report Run** — connect Google Sheets OAuth2 and replace `YOUR_INCOME_SHEET_ID`. Logs to the Report Log tab
7. Add at least 2-3 income and expense rows for the previous month before testing. Activate the workflow

## Monthly Schedule Trigger
Fires automatically on the 5th of every month. Adjust the day-of-month in the trigger if you want a different report date.

nodes.name: Section — Previous Month Calculation and Financial Data Fetch

parameters.content:
## Previous Month Calculation and Financial Data Fetch
Code calculates the previous month and year. Income and Expense tabs are read in parallel from Google Sheets — node 5 filters both for the previous month only.

nodes.name: Section — GPT-4o-mini Executive Report and HTML Cleanup

parameters.content:
## GPT-4o-mini Executive Report and HTML Cleanup
GPT-4o-mini analyzes the P&L and writes a full executive HTML report with KPI bar, revenue/cost/profit tables, and recommendations. Code strips any markdown fences from the output.

## Email and Log (Parallel)
Node 7 output branches to both. Gmail sends the HTML report to the finance team. Sheets logs the run summary to the Report Log tab.

parameters.content:
## P&L Statement Build
Code calculates Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Operating Expenses, and Net Profit with budget vs actual variance and profit margins. Builds a structured P&L text for the AI.
